name: player_team_success_rate_from_plays single-year no-split projects year+week onto base CTE
description: Regression (single-year, no offset range): the force_player_active variant joins the base nfl_plays CTE to nfl_games on (year, week) in create_player_team_stats_query, so year AND week must be projected onto the off-grouped base CTE in EVERY path -- not just offset ranges. Before the fix the base CTE grouped by off only and the gamelogs join referenced base.year/base.week that the CTE never emitted, raising `column t<hash>.year does not exist`. Pins the (off, year, week) base-CTE grain so the pid-keyed gamelogs join resolves and pools sum(num)/sum(den) (numeric, raw fraction) to pid.
expected_query: with "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_player_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" on "player_gamelogs"."tm" = "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."year" = "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."week" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_player_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays" AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_player_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_player_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('QB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_player_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
